zh.title: 雷·布拉德伯里预言全集 - 科幻大师对未来科技与社会的14条预言与验证 | Ray Bradbury Prophecies
zh.description: 美国科幻大师雷·布拉德伯里（1920-2012）通过《华氏451度》《火星编年史》等作品留下的14条预言完整收录，涵盖耳塞式耳机、平板电视、社交隔离、书籍审查、无人机战争等领域。多项预言已被现代科技印证。
zh.keywords: 雷布拉德伯里,华氏451度,科幻预言,Ray Bradbury,Fahrenheit 451,海螺耳机,平板电视预言,科幻作家预言,书籍审查,社交隔离
zh.ogTitle: 雷·布拉德伯里预言全集 | Ray Bradbury Prophecies
zh.ogDescription: 美国科幻大师雷·布拉德伯里通过小说作品留下的14条预言完整收录与验证分析。涵盖耳机、电视、审查、无人机等领域。
zh.twitterDescription: 14条科幻大师雷·布拉德伯里的预言，含真实度验证。已应验：海螺耳机（AirPods）、墙面电视、ATM机、真人秀节目等。

en.title: Ray Bradbury Prophecies - 14 Predictions from the Sci-Fi Visionary (1920-2012) | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: American sci-fi master Ray Bradbury (1920-2012) predicted earbuds, flat-screen TVs, social isolation, book censorship, drone warfare, and more through works like Fahrenheit 451 and The Martian Chronicles. Full archive with real-world verification.
en.keywords: Ray Bradbury,Fahrenheit 451,sci-fi predictions,Bradbury prophecy,seashell earbuds,wall TV,book banning,social isolation,drone warfare,Martian Chronicles
en.ogTitle: Ray Bradbury Prophecies - The Sci-Fi Visionary's Complete Predictions
en.ogDescription: 14 predictions from Ray Bradbury (1920-2012). Full archive with real-world verification covering earbuds, flat-screen TVs, censorship, social isolation, and more.
en.twitterDescription: 14 predictions from Ray Bradbury. Verified: seashell earbuds (AirPods), wall-screen TVs, ATMs, reality TV, and more.
